CREATE CREATE TABLE classrooms (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	room_number V

tags.value:
CREATE TABLE classrooms (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	room_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, 
	building VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	floor INTEGER, 
	capacity INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	room_type roomtype, 
	status classroomstatus, 
	description TEXT, 
	has_projector BOOLEAN, 
	has_whiteboard BOOLEAN, 
	has_computers BOOLEAN, 
	has_video_conf BOOLEAN, 
	has_ac BOOLEAN, 
	has_accessibility BOOLEAN, 
	is_deleted BOOLEAN, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

SELECT classrooms.id, classrooms.room_number, classrooms.name, classrooms.building, classrooms.floor, classrooms.capacity, classrooms.room_type, classrooms.status, classrooms.description, classrooms.has_projector, classrooms.has_whiteboard, classrooms.has_computers, classrooms.has_video_conf, classrooms.has_ac, classrooms.has_accessibility, classrooms.is_deleted, classrooms.created_at, classrooms.updated_at 
FROM classrooms 
WHERE classrooms.id = $1::UUID AND classrooms.is_deleted = false

SELECT classroom_schedules.classroom_id AS classroom_schedules_classroom_id, classroom_schedules.id AS classroom_schedules_id, classroom_schedules.course_name AS classroom_schedules_course_name, classroom_schedules.teacher_name AS classroom_schedules_teacher_name, classroom_schedules.day_of_week AS classroom_schedules_day_of_week, classroom_schedules.start_time AS classroom_schedules_start_time, classroom_schedules.end_time AS classroom_schedules_end_time, classroom_schedules.semester AS classroom_schedules_semester, classroom_schedules.academic_year AS classroom_schedules_academic_year, classroom_schedules.is_recurring AS classroom_schedules_is_recurring, classroom_schedules.created_at AS classroom_schedules_created_at 
FROM classroom_schedules 
WHERE classroom_schedules.classroom_id IN ($1::UUID)

tags.value:
CREATE TABLE classroom_schedules (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	classroom_id UUID NOT NULL, 
	course_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, 
	teacher_name VARCHAR(200), 
	day_of_week dayofweek NOT NULL, 
	start_time TIME WITHOUT TIME ZONE NOT NULL, 
	end_time TIME WITHOUT TIME ZONE NOT NULL, 
	semester VARCHAR(20), 
	academic_year VARCHAR(9), 
	is_recurring BOOLEAN, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(classroom_id) REFERENCES classrooms (id)
)

spans.operationName: CREATE CREATE TYPE dayofweek AS ENUM ('MONDAY', 'TUESDAY', 'WEDNESD

FROM classroom_schedules 
WHERE classroom_schedules.id = $1::UUID

SELECT pg_catalog.pg_class.relname 
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace ON pg_catalog.pg_namespace.oid = pg_catalog.pg_class.relnamespace 
WHERE pg_catalog.pg_class.relname = $1::VARCHAR AND pg_catalog.pg_class.relkind = ANY (ARRAY[$2::VARCHAR, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::VARCHAR, $6::VARCHAR]) AND pg_catalog.pg_table_is_visible(pg_catalog.pg_class.oid) AND pg_catalog.pg_namespace.nspname != $7::VARCHAR

FROM (SELECT classrooms.id AS id

tags.value:
SELECT count(*) AS count_1 
FROM (SELECT classrooms.id AS id, classrooms.room_number AS room_number, classrooms.name AS name, classrooms.building AS building, classrooms.floor AS floor, classrooms.capacity AS capacity, classrooms.room_type AS room_type, classrooms.status AS status, classrooms.description AS description, classrooms.has_projector AS has_projector, classrooms.has_whiteboard AS has_whiteboard, classrooms.has_computers AS has_computers, classrooms.has_video_conf AS has_video_conf, classrooms.has_ac AS has_ac, classrooms.has_accessibility AS has_accessibility, classrooms.is_deleted AS is_deleted, classrooms.created_at AS created_at, classrooms.updated_at AS updated_at 
FROM classrooms 
WHERE classrooms.is_deleted = false) AS anon_1

SELECT classrooms.id, classrooms.room_number, classrooms.name, classrooms.building, classrooms.floor, classrooms.capacity, classrooms.room_type, classrooms.status, classrooms.description, classrooms.has_projector, classrooms.has_whiteboard, classrooms.has_computers, classrooms.has_video_conf, classrooms.has_ac, classrooms.has_accessibility, classrooms.is_deleted, classrooms.created_at, classrooms.updated_at 
FROM classrooms 
WHERE classrooms.is_deleted = false ORDER BY classrooms.building, classrooms.room_number 
 LIMIT $1::INTEGER OFFSET $2::INTEGER

SELECT classroom_schedules.classroom_id AS classroom_schedules_classroom_id, classroom_schedules.id AS classroom_schedules_id, classroom_schedules.course_name AS classroom_schedules_course_name, classroom_schedules.teacher_name AS classroom_schedules_teacher_name, classroom_schedules.day_of_week AS classroom_schedules_day_of_week, classroom_schedules.start_time AS classroom_schedules_start_time, classroom_schedules.end_time AS classroom_schedules_end_time, classroom_schedules.semester AS classroom_schedules_semester, classroom_schedules.academic_year AS classroom_schedules_academic_year, classroom_schedules.is_recurring AS classroom_schedules_is_recurring, classroom_schedules.created_at AS classroom_schedules_created_at 
FROM classroom_schedules 
WHERE classroom_schedules.classroom_id IN ($1::UUID)
